indicators.name: open floor space
indicators.rationale: The open floor space allows for stretching and yoga poses without obstruction.

indicators.name: fountain in the center
indicators.rationale: The fountain is a significant obstacle for yoga practice, as it occupies a large portion of the floor space.

indicators.name: candles on the floor
indicators.rationale: Candles on the floor can pose a fire hazard and are not suitable for yoga practice.

indicators.name: potted plants
indicators.rationale: Potted plants can obstruct the floor space and are not suitable for yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: The open floor space and the presence of a fountain in the center make this space marginally suitable for yoga practice. However, the fountain and candles on the floor pose significant obstacles, reducing the overall suitability to a score of 3.
